channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KRISHNACAP] Krishna Capital & Securities: Open Offer for 5.44% at ₹20/share
item.description:
Acquirers Mr. Ashu Bishnoi and Mr. Yagnik Tank, through Grow House Wealth Management, have announced an open offer for Krishna Capital and Securities Ltd. They aim to acquire up to 18,04,508 equity shares, representing 5.44% of the emerging voting share capital, at a cash price of ₹20.00 per share. This open offer is triggered by a prior Share Purchase Agreement dated March 26, 2026, where the acquirers agreed to purchase 13,53,892 shares (42.87% of pre-issue share capital) from the selling promoters at the same price of ₹20.00 per share, totaling ₹2,70,77,840. The Draft Letter of Offer has been submitted to BSE in compliance with SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011.

  • Acquirers launched an open offer for Krishna Capital & Securities.
  • Offer to acquire 5.44% shares from public at ₹20.00 each.
  • Triggered by prior 42.87% promoter stake acquisition at ₹20.00.
  • Draft Letter of Offer submitted to BSE for public shareholders.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Krishna Capital and Securities Ltd | Category: Open Offer

item.title: [MSCTC] Mardia Samyoung allots 39 lakh shares from warrant conversion
item.description:
Mardia Samyoung Capillary Tubes Company Ltd has allotted 3,900,000 equity shares of face value ₹10 each. This allotment is a result of the conversion of 3,900,000 fully convertible equity warrants. These warrants were originally issued on February 6, 2026, to Mr. Gavali Hitendrabhai Bayajebhai, a non-promoter, at an issue price of ₹13.50 per warrant on a preferential basis. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from ₹75,54,80,730 (75,548,073 shares) to ₹79,44,80,730 (79,448,073 shares). The Board of Directors approved this conversion and allotment in a meeting held on April 13, 2026.

  • 3.9 million equity shares allotted by Mardia Samyoung.
  • Shares resulted from conversion of fully convertible equity warrants.
  • Warrants were issued to a non-promoter at ₹13.50 each.
  • Paid-up equity share capital increased to ₹79.45 crore.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MARDIA SAMYOUNG CAPILLARY TUBES COMPANY LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [HMAAGRO] HMA Agro Promoters Sell 3.31 Cr Shares for MPS Compliance
item.description:
HMA Agro Industries Ltd promoters, including Mohammad Ashraf Qureshi, Mohammad Mehmood Qureshi, Zulfiqar Ahmad Qureshi, Gulzar Ahmad, and Wajid Ahmed, have sold 3,31,81,173 equity shares of the company. The sale was conducted through an Offer for Sale via the stock exchange mechanism. This action was taken to comply with the Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS) requirements as per SEBI regulations. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • HMA Agro promoters sold 3.31 crore equity shares.
  • The sale was executed via an Offer for Sale on stock exchanges.
  • Purpose was to meet Minimum Public Shareholding norms.
  • Promoter group's pre-sale holding was 81.63%.
  • Individual promoter holdings reduced post-sale.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HMA Agro Industries Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [INDOCO] Indoco Remedies: USFDA Inspection at Aurangabad Facility with Zero 483s
item.description:
Indoco Remedies Ltd announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (U.S. FDA) completed a Pre-Approval Inspection at the Company's testing facility in Chhatrapati Sambaji Nagar (Aurangabad). The inspection was conducted from April 08, 2026, to April 10, 2026, and concluded with zero Form 483 observations. This positive outcome indicates the facility's compliance with regulatory standards, which is crucial for future product approvals and maintaining market access in the US.

  • USFDA completed Pre-Approval Inspection at Aurangabad facility.
  • Inspection took place from April 8 to April 10, 2026.
  • Concluded with zero Form 483 observations.
  • Positive outcome for regulatory compliance and future approvals.
  • Enhances company's standing with US regulatory body.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDOCO REMEDIES LTD. | Category: USFDA

item.title: [DECANBRG] Satani Bearings EGM Corrigendum Adds Auditor Certificate Agenda
item.description:
Satani Bearings Ltd issued a corrigendum to the notice for its Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) scheduled for April 30, 2026. The corrigendum adds a new special business item to the EGM agenda. Shareholders will be asked to consider and approve a special resolution to take on record a certificate issued by the company's Statutory Auditors, M/s. PAMS & Associates. This certificate confirms compliance with Regulation 45(3) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, specifically in relation to the company's previously approved name change from 'DECCAN BEARINGS LIMITED' to 'SATANI BEARINGS LIMITED'.

  • Satani Bearings issued a corrigendum for its EGM notice.
  • EGM is scheduled for April 30, 2026, via VC/OAVM.
  • New agenda item: approve auditor's certificate on SEBI Reg 45(3).
  • Certificate confirms compliance for the company's name change.
  • This ensures regulatory adherence for the name change process.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DECCAN BEARINGS LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [KRT] Knowledge Realty Trust's ICRA credit rating revalidated to [ICRA]AAA (Stable)
item.description:
Knowledge Realty Trust announced that ICRA Limited, a credit rating agency, has revalidated its credit rating. The rating for the company's non-convertible debentures and its corporate rating remains [ICRA]AAA (Stable). This revalidation confirms the previous rating, indicating a stable outlook for the company's financial instruments and overall creditworthiness. The details were provided in accordance with SEBI regulations, with rating letters dated April 13, 2026, and March 30, 2026, attached.

  • ICRA Limited revalidated Knowledge Realty Trust's credit rating.
  • The credit rating is confirmed as [ICRA]AAA (Stable).
  • Rating applies to non-convertible debentures and corporate rating.
  • This revalidation maintains the company's strong credit profile.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Knowledge Realty Trust | Category: Rating

item.title: [BCCFUBA] BCC Fuba India Allotted ₹8 Cr OCDs by Subsidiary IOGEMS Technologies
item.description:
BCC Fuba India Limited has been allotted Optionally Convertible Debentures (OCDs) aggregating to INR 8,00,00,000/- (Rupees Eight Crores Only) by its subsidiary company, IOGEMS Technologies Private Limited. The OCDs, with a face value of INR 10 each, were issued at par on a private placement basis. These are 7% unsecured debentures, convertible into equity shares, with an annual interest payment. The debentures have a tenure of 7 years from the allotment date of April 10, 2026, and are redeemable at face value at maturity, though holders can convert them into equity shares at any time before maturity.

  • BCC Fuba India invested ₹8 crore in its subsidiary, IOGEMS Technologies.
  • The investment is in 7% Optionally Convertible Debentures (OCDs).
  • OCDs were allotted via private placement, with a 7-year tenure.
  • The debentures are convertible into equity shares before maturity.
  • Interest of 7% per annum is payable annually on the OCDs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BCC FUBA INDIA LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [NPRFIN] NPR Finance: Statutory Auditor's Office Address Changes
item.description:
NPR Finance Ltd. has informed about a change in the main office address of its Statutory Auditor, M/s. Deoki Bijay & Co. The new address is Sneha Garden, A Block, 1st Floor, Flat No. AIC, 28 Rai Bahadur Road, Kolkata 700 053. A contact number, 9433039556, was also provided. This is an administrative update regarding the auditor's contact information.

  • NPR Finance announced a change in its statutory auditor's office address.
  • M/s. Deoki Bijay & Co. is the statutory auditor for the company.
  • The new main office address is located in Kolkata.
  • This is a routine administrative update for the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NPR FINANCE LTD. | Category: Auditor

item.title: [VALSONQ] Valson Industries not a 'Large Corporate' as of Mar 31, 2026
item.description:
Valson Industries Ltd. has officially informed that it does not meet the criteria to be classified as a 'Large Corporate' as of March 31, 2026. This determination is in accordance with the SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/20181144 dated November 26, 2018, which outlines the applicability criteria for fund raising through the issuance of Debt Securities by Large Corporates. The company has requested that this intimation be recorded.

  • Valson Industries is not classified as a 'Large Corporate'.
  • Status is as per SEBI guidelines for debt security issuance.
  • Classification is based on criteria as of March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VALSON INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [ICICIAMC] ICICI Pru AMC Board Approves Q4/FY26 Results, Recommends ₹12.40 Dividend
item.description:
ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 13, 2026, to approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board also recommended a final dividend of ₹12.40 per equity share for FY2026, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. Additionally, the Board approved the appointment of M/s. Parikh & Associates as Secretarial Auditors for five years (FY2027-FY2031) and granted up to 0.78 million stock options and 0.19 million stock units under employee schemes.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY2026.
  • Recommended a final dividend of ₹12.40 per equity share for FY2026.
  • Appointed M/s. Parikh & Associates as Secretarial Auditors for five years.
  • Granted up to 0.78 million stock options under ESOP Scheme 2025.
  • Granted up to 0.19 million stock units under ESU Scheme 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
